item.title: TheAsset180: Paul Nicholson @TheAsset180 · 19min These are the highlights from Tuesday at Champions Week. Today, the first player wi
Everton: Stuart Pyke reposteó Everton @Everton · 1h Remembering the 97 on the 37th anniversary of the Hillsborough disaster. A tr
item.description:
Stuart Pyke reposteó Everton @Everton · 1h Remembering the 97 on the 37th anniversary of the Hillsborough disaster. A tragic day for football and our city.
Forever in our thoughts. 25 479 2 mil 35 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 8h "𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙄’𝙢 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙯𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙, 𝙄 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙡𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩."
Recap & reaction a
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 8h "𝙒𝙝𝙚𝙣 𝙄’𝙢 𝙞𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙯𝙤𝙣𝙚 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙜𝙤𝙤𝙙, 𝙄 𝙘𝙤𝙪𝙡𝙙 𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙙𝙖𝙮 𝙡𝙞𝙠𝙚 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩."
Recap & reaction as Nijman adds a fantastic fourth ranking title of the season De live-darts.com 1 4 2 mil

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 8h 'Well, I couldn't win it when I was in my prime, so I can't see me winning it, obviously.'
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 8h 'Well, I couldn't win it when I was in my prime, so I can't see me winning it, obviously.'
Admirable honesty from Matthew Stevens after booking a Crucible return.
He talks upsets and motivation De metro.co.uk 11 35 2 mil
